channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CLIR-Bench: Benchmarking Multimodal Question Answering over Irregular Clinical Time Series
item.description: CLIR-Bench: Benchmarking Multimodal Question Answering over Irregular Clinical Time Series

item.description: RouteRec: Strict Evaluation of Recommender-Agent Selection and Aggregation

item.description: Instruction Set and Language for Hypergraphs

item.description: Equal Accuracy, Unequal Evidence: Search APIs as Decision Surfaces for Tool-Using Agents

item.description: Consensus vs. Dissent: Dynamic LLM Modeling of Subjective Preferences in Group Recommenders

item.description: PTEI: Integrating Personality Traits to Enhance Emotional Intelligence in Large Language Models

item.description: One mechanism for many mental spaces: a shared router over a value slot in language models

item.description: Which Languages Transfer Best to Warlpiri? A Similarity-Based Study for Low-Resource ASR

item.description: Language Re-generation: An investigation into information locality effects on reconstruction

item.description: PolyInterview: An LLM-based Platform for Immersive Mock Interview Practice with Comprehensive Multimodal Assessment

item.description: CAFE: A Compound-AI Factorial Evaluation Framework

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Structured Thoughts For Improved Reasoning And Context Pruning
item.description: Structured Thoughts For Improved Reasoning And Context Pruning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Stepwise Questioning Expert-Editor Multi-Agent Framework for Long-Document Summarization
item.description: A Stepwise Questioning Expert-Editor Multi-Agent Framework for Long-Document Summarization

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Enjoy Your Talk: A Human-Centered Benchmark for Multi-Turn Dialogue with Decoupled User Simulation, Target Modeling, and Judging
item.description: Enjoy Your Talk: A Human-Centered Benchmark for Multi-Turn Dialogue with Decoupled User Simulation, Target Modeling, and Judging

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models Using Diversion Decoding
item.description: Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models Using Diversion Decoding

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Reasoning Hurts Legal Drafting: The Verbalization Bottleneck in Patent Claim Generation
item.description: When Reasoning Hurts Legal Drafting: The Verbalization Bottleneck in Patent Claim Generation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Articulate Intuition or Genuine Analysis? Benchmarking Epistemic Reliability in LLM-as-a-Judge Peer Reviews
item.description: Articulate Intuition or Genuine Analysis? Benchmarking Epistemic Reliability in LLM-as-a-Judge Peer Reviews

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] UNIBROWSE: A Data-to-Agent Framework for Multimodal BrowseComp
item.description: UNIBROWSE: A Data-to-Agent Framework for Multimodal BrowseComp

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Demographic Prompting at Scale: When More Attributes Hurt LLM--Human Agreement
item.description: Demographic Prompting at Scale: When More Attributes Hurt LLM--Human Agreement

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Non-binary bottom-up constituency parsing without arity actions
item.description: Non-binary bottom-up constituency parsing without arity actions

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Knowledge Graphs Meet Graph Neural Networks: A Comprehensive Survey
item.description: Survey proposes taxonomy framework for applying Graph Neural Networks across knowledge graph construction, embedding, reasoning, and applications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Position: Every Ground Truth is a Human Construction, not an Objective Truth
item.description: Ground truth datasets are human constructions shaped by context and choices, requiring transparency about their limits and intended use.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AuditWeave: A Tamper-Evident, Auditor-Navigable Evidence Layer for AI-Assisted and Data-Transformation Workflows
item.description: AuditWeave records AI-assisted workflow steps in tamper-evident, hash-chained ledgers that detect modifications in regulated industries.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Ablation, Statistical Inference, and Validation for KV-Cache Compression
item.description: Study compares KV-cache compression methods, finding eigenbasis approaches fail on heavy-tailed data but succeed in structured regimes with adaptive semantic dimensions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SciML in the Wild: A Diagnostic Study of When Structural Priors Help and When They Hurt
item.description: Structural priors in scientific machine learning can degrade forecasting when misaligned with underlying dynamics; less-constrained models often outperform more-constrained ones.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MawForge: Memory-Bounded Expert Materialization for Local Mixture-of-Experts Inference
item.description: MawForge enables local Mixture-of-Experts inference on memory-constrained machines by materializing expert tensors on-demand while keeping common tensors resident.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Prioritizing Search Space Regions in the Low Autocorrelation Binary Sequences Problem
item.description: Researchers improve solutions to the low autocorrelation binary sequences problem using Thompson sampling and GPU-accelerated parallel search methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] What Context Does a Coding Agent Actually Need to Act?
item.description: Agents need only target code to edit; natural language summaries and surrounding files add little value; compressed context saves tokens.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reference-Based Distillation Detection in LLMs
item.description: Reference-Based Distillation Detection in LLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Depth-Entropy Guided Sampling for Training-Free LLM Reasoning
item.description: Depth-Entropy Guided Sampling for Training-Free LLM Reasoning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Low-Rank Attention Residuals
item.description: Low-Rank Attention Residuals

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FedCausal-Dyn: A Causal-Dynamic Paradigm for Federated Learning under Dynamic Feature Drift
item.description: FedCausal-Dyn: A Causal-Dynamic Paradigm for Federated Learning under Dynamic Feature Drift

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Mitigating Early Training Collapse in CTR Models
item.description: Mitigating Early Training Collapse in CTR Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Safe responses matter: Output-aware safety guardrail mitigate over-refusal in MLLMs
item.description: Safe responses matter: Output-aware safety guardrail mitigate over-refusal in MLLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Quantum-Inspired Contextual Learning for Sparse-Ring Fraud Detection in Dynamic Transaction Graphs
item.description: Quantum-Inspired Contextual Learning for Sparse-Ring Fraud Detection in Dynamic Transaction Graphs

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Manifold Constrained Tabular Deep Neural Networks
item.description: Manifold Constrained Tabular Deep Neural Networks

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] EvoClawBench: Can Agents Learn Reusable Skills from Their Own Runs?
item.description: EvoClawBench: Can Agents Learn Reusable Skills from Their Own Runs?

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ERP Data Provisioning Financial Control Testing
item.description: ERP Data Provisioning Financial Control Testing

item.description: Gauge dependence and structured-output corruption in sign-branched repetition penalties: measurements across models, inference stacks, and alternative repetition controls

item.description: Metadata-Free Meta-Reweighted Direct Preference Optimization under Noisy Preference Labels

item.description: JEPA for AI-Native 6G: Predictive Representations and Open Challenges

item.description: The Silent Freeze: Predicting When Low-Precision Training Stops Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Discovering Latent Response Laws in Forced Physical Systems
item.description: Discovering Latent Response Laws in Forced Physical Systems

item.description: A Strong Balanced-Softmax Classifier-Retraining Baseline for Long-Tailed Recognition

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Direction to Magnitude: How Multimodal Instruction-Tuning Reorganizes the Geometric Encoding of Identity-Specifying Prompts in Transformer Hidden States
item.description: From Direction to Magnitude: How Multimodal Instruction-Tuning Reorganizes the Geometric Encoding of Identity-Specifying Prompts in Transformer Hidden States
